_comment: Explicit-solvent MD settings for the beta-tubulin / taxol replicate protocol. Mirrors SETTINGS_TEMPLATE in scripts/run_replicates_taxol.py. Maps to backend.app.md.job.MdRunSettings. The octahedron box + A439-451 truncation are load-bearing: they reproduce the reference ~191k-atom system (cube + no truncation inflate it to ~680k).
